---
title: "MarketResearch.com Academic"
page-layout: article
---

# MarketResearch.com Academic

## Description

Market research platform providing reports on consumer, demographic, lifestyle, industrial, and product markets. Supports industry analysis, market sizing, and consumer research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=https://www.marketresearch.com/academic/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
